case_title: PATRINA ROSE HALL VS. WOLFGANG PUCK CATERING AND EVENTS, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY HALL, PATRINA ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFGANG PUCK CATERING AND EVENTS, LLC RICKENBACH, JOSHUA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALL, PATRINA ROSE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WOLFGANG PUCK CATERING AND EVENTS, LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALL, PATRINA ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFGANG PUCK CATERING AND EVENTS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LUKE OBERSON--REGIONAL MANGER WOLFGANG PUCK. DEFENDANT WOLFGANG ETC. WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED JAN-31-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RICKENBACH, JOSHUA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO WOLFGANG PUCK CATERING AND EVENTS, LLC BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAR-29-2013 AT 8:30 AM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL, PATRINA ROSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RICKENBACH, JOSHUA PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST WOLFGANG PUCK CATERING IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-28-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WOLFGANG PUCK CATERING AND EVENTS, LLC
